main.name: Osafo-Osei Jonathan, GEORGE
main.bio: Hi there! I am GEORGE! I've been coding for approximately 2 years now. As a Mobile App Developer I've worked with both startups and medium corporations to help build & scale their companies. Along the journey I realised my passion existed in helping others solve their simple and complex problem with technology. With this passion, I have now, with the help of my capable partners, built some working prototypes of mobile applications across the my country, Ghana. I seek deliver REAL VALUE by solving REAL WORLD problems with my projects to help people solve the problems of their world.
main.contactmessage: Get in touch with me to help you solve your problems with TECHNOLOGY!

education.degree: Higher National Diplomat, Computer Network Management

work.title: Founder and CEO
work.description: Using technology to solve basic and complex problems in and around the society.

testimonials.text: Sonny is absolutely excellent, his depth of knowledge & his mentorship really meant a lot to us... I would definitely recommend
Learning with Sonny has been AWESOME, he makes learning React so easy and approachable, you'll finally feel like you know what's going on!
